title: APLICACIÓN DE ESTIÉRCOL ADAPTADA A LAS NECESIDADES DE LAS PLANTAS
description: A guide for tailoring manure application to plant nutrient requirements to enhance soil structure, microbial activity, and nutritional balance while reducing reliance on chemical fertilizers. It outlines best practices such as soil and effluent analyses, timing and method of application, and techniques to minimize environmental impacts like nitrogen losses and soil compaction.
